steps.title: Spot the violated prediction
steps.content: The first sentence predicts that debris rings outside the Roche limit should accrete into satellites. The Quaoar ring remained intact despite being well outside that limit, so the second sentence pushes against the expectation.

steps.title: Choose a contrast transition
steps.content: A signals similarity, B says the result is expected, and C introduces an example of the rule. The sentence needs a contrast marker for a finding that defies the rule. The answer is D.
